summary: Iteration 90: Tested TV Series & Anime Pipeline system. All backend APIs for /api/series-pipeline/* work correctly including genres (10 TV, 8 anime), create, advance-to-casting, available-actors, select-cast, advance-to-screenplay, write-screenplay (AI), start-production, production-status, and release. Frontend PRODUCI card opens production menu overlay with '1 da sbloccare' badge (only emittente_tv locked). SeriesTVPipeline and AnimePipeline pages show full create forms with genre grids and episode sliders. EmittenteTVPage shows locked state with requirements (Level 18, Fame 200, $5M cost).

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed, 2 fixture errors due to max concurrent limit)

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed series during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User fandrex1@gmail.com has studio_serie_tv and studio_anime unlocked. Only emittente_tv is locked. User has 2 completed TV series: 'TEST_Full_Pipeline' (84.2 quality) and 'Roma Criminale' (93.6 quality). Production menu correctly shows '1 da sbloccare' badge. All series pipeline endpoints verified working including full flow: concept->casting->screenplay->production->release.
